examples.en: Each player draws five cards to start.
examples.zh: 每位玩家開局先抽五張牌。

examples.en: This game is for two to four players.
examples.zh: 這個遊戲適合二到四位玩家。

examples.en: We played a board game after dinner.
This board game needs a big table.
examples.zh: 這款桌遊需要一張大桌子。

examples.en: Roll the dice to move your piece.
examples.zh: 擲骰子來移動你的棋子。

examples.en: She shook the dice in her hands.
He picked a card from the deck.
examples.zh: 他從牌堆裡抽了一張牌。

examples.en: Hide your cards from the others.
examples.zh: 別讓其他人看到你的牌。

examples.en: A standard deck has fifty-two cards.
examples.zh: 一副標準撲克牌有五十二張。

examples.en: Shuffle the deck before we deal.
Please shuffle the cards well.
He shuffled the deck three times.
Deal five cards to each player.
It's your turn to deal.
It's your turn to roll.
Wait for your turn, please.
What's the final score?
She kept the highest score all night.
Let's read the rules first.
Breaking the rules ends your turn.
examples.zh: 違反規則會結束你的回合。

examples.en: The first to reach the end wins.
examples.zh: 最先抵達終點的人獲勝。

examples.en: I finally won a round!
Nobody likes to lose.
He lost the game by one point.
examples.zh: 他以一分之差輸掉了比賽。

examples.en: My opponent made a smart move.
examples.zh: 我的對手下了漂亮的一步。

examples.en: Study your opponent's habits.
Don't cheat during the game.
He was caught cheating at cards.
He likes to bluff in poker.
Was she bluffing or telling the truth?
examples.zh: 她是在唬人還是說真話?

examples.en: How much do you want to bet?
He bet all his chips at once.
examples.zh: 他一次押上了所有籌碼。

examples.en: She stacked her poker chips neatly.
examples.zh: 她把撲克籌碼整齊地疊好。

examples.en: Each chip is worth ten points.
Pass me the game controller.
The controller ran out of battery.
He bought a new game console.
examples.zh: 他買了一台新的遊戲主機。

examples.en: Plug the console into the TV.
I finally passed level ten.
This level is really hard.
Choose your character before you start.
examples.zh: 開始前先選好你的角色。

examples.en: My character has special powers.
Finish the quest to earn gold.
examples.zh: 完成任務就能賺取金幣。

examples.en: This quest takes about an hour.
examples.zh: 這個任務大約要一小時。

examples.en: You get a reward for winning.
The final reward is a rare sword.
examples.zh: 最終獎勵是一把稀有的劍。

examples.en: Move your pawn forward one space.
He lost a pawn early in the game.
examples.zh: 他在開局早期就失去了一個兵。

examples.en: Put your piece on the start square.
examples.zh: 把你的棋子放在起點格。

examples.en: One game piece is missing.
Each player picks a colored token.
examples.zh: 每位玩家選一個彩色代幣。

examples.en: Move your token around the board.
examples.zh: 讓你的代幣繞著棋盤走。

examples.en: Draw a tile from the bag.
Place the tile next to the road.
Draw two cards on your turn.
He drew a lucky card.
That card makes you skip a turn.
examples.zh: 那張牌會讓你跳過一回合。

examples.en: I had to skip my turn.
If you can't play, just pass.
She chose to pass this round.
That was a clever move.
Think before your next move.
examples.zh: 在下一步之前先想清楚。

examples.en: You need a good strategy to win.
His strategy was to play slowly.
Split into two teams.
Our team won by ten points.
examples.zh: 我們隊以十分優勢獲勝。

img: group of players as a team

examples.en: Let's play one more round.
She won the first round.
The game ended in a tie.
A tie means we play again.
examples.zh: 平手就代表要再比一次。

img: two players shaking hands even score

examples.en: Don't quit before the game ends.
He quit halfway through.
You respawn after you die.
Wait five seconds to respawn.
Reach the checkpoint to save.
I died right before the checkpoint.
This is a fun multiplayer game.
We joined a multiplayer match.
examples.zh: 我們加入了一場多人對戰。

examples.en: The match lasted twenty minutes.
examples.zh: 這場對戰持續了二十分鐘。

examples.en: They lost the final match.
examples.zh: 他們輸了最後一場比賽。

img: two teams in a game match

examples.en: Watch out for the trap ahead.
He fell into a hidden trap.
Try to guess the secret word.
examples.zh: 試著猜出這個秘密單字。

examples.en: You only get three guesses.
Give me one more clue.
The clue points to a color.
examples.zh: 這個線索指向一種顏色。

examples.en: Can you solve this riddle?
The riddle was too tricky.
Spin the wheel to see your prize.
She spun the spinner and moved.
Find your way out of the maze.
The maze had many dead ends.

img: top view of a maze puzzle

examples.en: This puzzle has a thousand pieces.
We solved the puzzle together.
examples.zh: 我們一起解開了這個謎題。

examples.en: Set the timer for one minute.
Answer before the timer runs out.
The host explains the rules.
You need the host to start.
The last player will eliminate one rival.
examples.zh: 最後一位玩家會淘汰一名對手。

examples.en: He was eliminated in round two.
Let's replay that fun level.
examples.zh: 我們重玩那個好玩的關卡吧。

examples.en: You can replay the match anytime.
examples.zh: 你隨時可以重玩這場比賽。
